description_long: This object is a stylized pagoda complex set on a rectangular black base, featuring a prominent multi-tiered pagoda with turquoise roofs and a golden spire. The main pagoda has eight distinct, upward-stepping roof levels, each with wide eaves, and is topped by a detailed ornamental finial. Surrounding the pagoda are several smaller structures, including a miniature pagoda and a cluster of cubic, gray buildings with window patterns, suggesting an urban context. At the front, there is a gateway with three arches and decorative red accents, flanked by two gold-tipped posts. The base platform is flat and slightly raised, with additional small architectural elements at the corners. The overall composition blends traditional East Asian pagoda architecture with modern urban motifs.
description: A stylized multi-tiered pagoda with turquoise roofs and a golden spire, surrounded by smaller buildings and set on a black rectangular base. The complex features a prominent gateway and blends traditional and modern architectural elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main pagoda, the arched gateway with red accents, and the symmetrical arrangement of smaller buildings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered turquoise roofs of the pagoda and the smaller pagoda structure behind the main gateway.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the main pagoda and the cluster of cubic buildings, with the golden spire prominently visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the relationship between the main pagoda, the smaller pagoda, and the modern cubic buildings.
